attributes.net.peer.name: localhost
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID

attributes.net.peer.name: localhost
attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT projects.id, projects.name, projects.description, projects.owner_id, projects.created_at 
FROM projects 
WHERE projects.owner_id = $1::UUID

attributes.db.statement:

SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.project_id = $1::UUID
